languages.text: {n}Хруст веток выдает приближение группы людей. Вы видите Янура. Он появляется столь же внезапно, как и при первой встрече. Видимо, выдавший его звук был своеобразным вежливым предупреждением.{/n}

{n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Хруст веток выдает приближение группы людей. Вы видите Янура. Он появляется столь же внезапно, как и при первой встрече. Видимо, выдавший его звук был своеобразным вежливым предупреждением.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}

{n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}

{n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur and another soldier appear just as suddenly as the first time you met them. The sound that gave them away must have been their version of a polite warning.{/n}

{n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}

{n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}

languages.text: {n}枝の折れる音で、人々の接近を察知する。ジャヌールともう一人の兵士は、初めて出会った時と同じように突然現れた。彼らを露見させた音は、彼らにとっての礼儀正しい警告だったに違いない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur and another soldier appear just as suddenly as the first time you met them. The sound that gave them away must have been their version of a polite warning.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 枝の折れる音で、人々の接近を察知する。ジャヌールともう一人の兵士は、初めて出会った時と同じように突然現れた。彼らを露見させた音は、彼らにとっての礼儀正しい警告だったに違いない。

languages.text: {n}Dalların çatırdaması, insanların yaklaştığını haber veriyor. Janur, en az ilk karşılaşmanızdaki kadar aniden ortaya çıkıyor. Anlaşılan onu ele veren ses, muhtemelen kibarca uyarıda bulunma şekli oluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dalların çatırdaması, insanların yaklaştığını haber veriyor. Janur, en az ilk karşılaşmanızdaki kadar aniden ortaya çıkıyor. Anlaşılan onu ele veren ses, muhtemelen kibarca uyarıda bulunma şekli oluyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El crujido de las ramas precede a la llegada de dos personas: Janur aparece de forma tan repentina como en vuestro primer encuentro. Por lo visto, el sonido que lo ha delatado ha sido su forma de lanzar una advertencia educada.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El crujido de las ramas precede a la llegada de dos personas: Janur aparece de forma tan repentina como en vuestro primer encuentro. Por lo visto, el sonido que lo ha delatado ha sido su forma de lanzar una advertencia educada.{/n}

languages.text: {n}树枝断裂的声音预示着有人靠近。如同你们第一次见面那般，雅努尔突然出现在你面前。看来，刚刚暴露他行踪的声音，必定是他特有的礼貌警告方式。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}树枝断裂的声音预示着有人靠近。如同你们第一次见面那般，雅努尔突然出现在你面前。看来，刚刚暴露他行踪的声音，必定是他特有的礼貌警告方式。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le craquement de brindilles écrasées vous indique que vous avez de la compagnie. Janur apparaît aussi soudainement qu'au moment de votre première rencontre. Il semble avoir délibérément fait du bruit par politesse, afin d'éviter de vous surprendre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The cracking of twigs heralds the approach of people. Janur appears just as suddenly as the first time you met. Apparently, the sound that gave him away must have been his version of a polite warning.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le craquement de brindilles écrasées vous indique que vous avez de la compagnie. Janur apparaît aussi soudainement qu'au moment de votre première rencontre. Il semble avoir délibérément fait du bruit par politesse, afin d'éviter de vous surprendre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Knacken von Zweigen kündigt die Ankunft mehrerer Personen an. Januar taucht ebenso schnell vor dir auf wie bei eurem ersten Treffen. Das Geräusch, das ihn verraten hat, war offenbar seine Version einer höflichen Warnung.{/n}
